charlatan v0.4.1.92
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Create fake colors

Source: R/color.R
ch_color.Rd

Create fake colors

ch_color_name(n = 1, locale = NULL)

ch_safe_color_name(n = 1, locale = NULL)

ch_hex_color(n = 1)

ch_safe_hex_color(n = 1)

ch_rgb_color(n = 1)

ch_rgb_css_color(n = 1)

Arguments

n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer
locale

(character) the locale to use. See ColorProvider$new()$allowed_locales() for locales supported. Affects the ch_color_name and ch_safe_color_name functions

See also

ColorProvider

Examples

ch_color_name()

#> [1] "Khaki"
ch_color_name(10)

#>  [1] "DarkCyan"      "LavenderBlush" "DarkRed"       "SlateBlue"    
#>  [5] "Teal"          "PaleGreen"     "OldLace"       "ForestGreen"  
#>  [9] "DeepPink"      "Cyan"         
ch_color_name(500)

#>   [1] "MediumSeaGreen"       "DarkRed"              "Yellow"              
#>   [4] "Thistle"              "MediumBlue"           "Chartreuse"          
#>   [7] "ForestGreen"          "Fuchsia"              "Red"                 
#>  [10] "SpringGreen"          "LightSalmon"          "MediumTurquoise"     
#>  [13] "Maroon"               "MediumPurple"         "DarkBlue"            
#>  [16] "Lavender"             "SandyBrown"           "Purple"              
#>  [19] "Silver"               "DarkOliveGreen"       "Navy"                
#>  [22] "SlateBlue"            "Fuchsia"              "Peru"                
#>  [25] "Chocolate"            "CornflowerBlue"       "Aquamarine"          
#>  [28] "PaleTurquoise"        "GhostWhite"           "LightGoldenRodYellow"
#>  [31] "PaleGoldenRod"        "DarkSlateGray"        "Snow"                
#>  [34] "MediumSlateBlue"      "Fuchsia"              "Navy"                
#>  [37] "DarkSlateBlue"        "DarkSlateBlue"        "Fuchsia"             
#>  [40] "SlateGray"            "PeachPuff"            "OrangeRed"           
#>  [43] "SeaGreen"             "DarkTurquoise"        "PaleGreen"           
#>  [46] "DarkOliveGreen"       "CornflowerBlue"       "MediumAquaMarine"    
#>  [49] "SkyBlue"              "BlanchedAlmond"       "Silver"              
#>  [52] "DarkKhaki"            "FireBrick"            "PaleVioletRed"       
#>  [55] "DarkKhaki"            "Turquoise"            "Tan"                 
#>  [58] "MediumVioletRed"      "DarkKhaki"            "Fuchsia"             
#>  [61] "Gold"                 "SaddleBrown"          "Linen"               
#>  [64] "Yellow"               "AliceBlue"            "DarkSlateGray"       
#>  [67] "Salmon"               "DarkGray"             "Linen"               
#>  [70] "PaleTurquoise"        "PaleTurquoise"        "AntiqueWhite"        
#>  [73] "Orchid"               "LightBlue"            "SlateBlue"           
#>  [76] "ForestGreen"          "NavajoWhite"          "Tan"                 
#>  [79] "SeaGreen"             "Teal"                 "SteelBlue"           
#>  [82] "SlateBlue"            "PapayaWhip"           "DarkSeaGreen"        
#>  [85] "SkyBlue"              "HotPink"              "MediumAquaMarine"    
#>  [88] "DarkSlateBlue"        "LightGray"            "MediumVioletRed"     
#>  [91] "Thistle"              "ForestGreen"          "Chartreuse"          
#>  [94] "Chartreuse"           "Lavender"             "Chartreuse"          
#>  [97] "PaleGreen"            "LightCyan"            "Green"               
#> [100] "LightBlue"            "LightGreen"           "Olive"               
#> [103] "GreenYellow"          "LimeGreen"            "Orchid"              
#> [106] "SteelBlue"            "BlanchedAlmond"       "Brown"               
#> [109] "Wheat"                "Silver"               "GreenYellow"         
#> [112] "MediumBlue"           "MediumOrchid"         "DarkOliveGreen"      
#> [115] "LawnGreen"            "LightSteelBlue"       "PaleTurquoise"       
#> [118] "MediumTurquoise"      "GoldenRod"            "Sienna"              
#> [121] "Linen"                "Chartreuse"           "LightGreen"          
#> [124] "CornflowerBlue"       "LightSlateGray"       "MediumOrchid"        
#> [127] "Cyan"                 "Pink"                 "Green"               
#> [130] "PaleVioletRed"        "Pink"                 "Indigo"              
#> [133] "OldLace"              "FloralWhite"          "Turquoise"           
#> [136] "White"                "Maroon"               "Maroon"              
#> [139] "Red"                  "LightGreen"           "Moccasin"            
#> [142] "DarkViolet"           "MediumVioletRed"      "Coral"               
#> [145] "LightSeaGreen"        "MediumBlue"           "Lavender"            
#> [148] "DarkSeaGreen"         "Orchid"               "MistyRose"           
#> [151] "IndianRed"            "Yellow"               "BlueViolet"          
#> [154] "White"                "Yellow"               "NavajoWhite"         
#> [157] "LightSlateGray"       "Bisque"               "White"               
#> [160] "DarkTurquoise"        "Purple"               "LightSkyBlue"        
#> [163] "DarkKhaki"            "DarkTurquoise"        "White"               
#> [166] "Plum"                 "Magenta"              "FireBrick"           
#> [169] "SaddleBrown"          "Lime"                 "Ivory"               
#> [172] "PaleGoldenRod"        "DarkGreen"            "Gold"                
#> [175] "LightCyan"            "GreenYellow"          "Snow"                
#> [178] "Cyan"                 "PapayaWhip"           "Turquoise"           
#> [181] "MediumSlateBlue"      "DarkOrange"           "DodgerBlue"          
#> [184] "LightPink"            "OliveDrab"            "LightGoldenRodYellow"
#> [187] "SlateGray"            "Chartreuse"           "Chocolate"           
#> [190] "MediumPurple"         "MediumVioletRed"      "MediumSpringGreen"   
#> [193] "LightCoral"           "Fuchsia"              "LawnGreen"           
#> [196] "Blue"                 "PeachPuff"            "MediumSeaGreen"      
#> [199] "SaddleBrown"          "LightSalmon"          "DeepPink"            
#> [202] "Khaki"                "Silver"               "Beige"               
#> [205] "Olive"                "PaleTurquoise"        "GreenYellow"         
#> [208] "RoyalBlue"            "Gray"                 "PapayaWhip"          
#> [211] "DarkRed"              "Magenta"              "LemonChiffon"        
#> [214] "LightSlateGray"       "MediumBlue"           "Linen"               
#> [217] "LightYellow"          "DarkBlue"             "PaleGreen"           
#> [220] "Ivory"                "PowderBlue"           "PaleGreen"           
#> [223] "OldLace"              "Azure"                "Cyan"                
#> [226] "Gold"                 "PowderBlue"           "DarkSalmon"          
#> [229] "YellowGreen"          "DarkOliveGreen"       "YellowGreen"         
#> [232] "Gainsboro"            "Olive"                "WhiteSmoke"          
#> [235] "DarkTurquoise"        "Tomato"               "IndianRed"           
#> [238] "LightBlue"            "Plum"                 "CadetBlue"           
#> [241] "Navy"                 "Turquoise"            "LightSkyBlue"        
#> [244] "PaleVioletRed"        "Aqua"                 "Olive"               
#> [247] "BurlyWood"            "Tomato"               "RoyalBlue"           
#> [250] "MediumVioletRed"      "YellowGreen"          "PaleTurquoise"       
#> [253] "Snow"                 "BurlyWood"            "ForestGreen"         
#> [256] "LightGreen"           "Tan"                  "Tan"                 
#> [259] "NavajoWhite"          "YellowGreen"          "Gold"                
#> [262] "DarkMagenta"          "Chartreuse"           "Yellow"              
#> [265] "MintCream"            "Khaki"                "Sienna"              
#> [268] "Sienna"               "Black"                "Lavender"            
#> [271] "Crimson"              "DarkGray"             "DarkGreen"           
#> [274] "LavenderBlush"        "LightBlue"            "Black"               
#> [277] "BlueViolet"           "Chartreuse"           "LightBlue"           
#> [280] "Aquamarine"           "BlueViolet"           "MediumAquaMarine"    
#> [283] "MediumTurquoise"      "GreenYellow"          "Salmon"              
#> [286] "Silver"               "DeepSkyBlue"          "DarkViolet"          
#> [289] "LightCoral"           "NavajoWhite"          "DarkTurquoise"       
#> [292] "Orchid"               "AliceBlue"            "Coral"               
#> [295] "SeaShell"             "Thistle"              "Turquoise"           
#> [298] "DarkViolet"           "PaleVioletRed"        "OldLace"             
#> [301] "Maroon"               "SteelBlue"            "Gainsboro"           
#> [304] "DarkSalmon"           "AliceBlue"            "SeaShell"            
#> [307] "Maroon"               "OliveDrab"            "AntiqueWhite"        
#> [310] "DimGray"              "WhiteSmoke"           "LightBlue"           
#> [313] "LawnGreen"            "Tan"                  "WhiteSmoke"          
#> [316] "DarkGreen"            "Maroon"               "Maroon"              
#> [319] "DarkBlue"             "MediumTurquoise"      "DarkMagenta"         
#> [322] "Maroon"               "DarkOliveGreen"       "DarkSeaGreen"        
#> [325] "MediumSeaGreen"       "Silver"               "IndianRed"           
#> [328] "SteelBlue"            "Orchid"               "Thistle"             
#> [331] "LightBlue"            "Navy"                 "Chocolate"           
#> [334] "SeaShell"             "DeepSkyBlue"          "SeaGreen"            
#> [337] "RosyBrown"            "YellowGreen"          "NavajoWhite"         
#> [340] "MediumVioletRed"      "PeachPuff"            "SeaShell"            
#> [343] "DarkGreen"            "WhiteSmoke"           "PowderBlue"          
#> [346] "MediumTurquoise"      "LemonChiffon"         "DarkViolet"          
#> [349] "LightSkyBlue"         "BlueViolet"           "Peru"                
#> [352] "PaleTurquoise"        "MediumOrchid"         "Olive"               
#> [355] "Linen"                "Lavender"             "LightSalmon"         
#> [358] "LawnGreen"            "Tan"                  "Ivory"               
#> [361] "Fuchsia"              "CornflowerBlue"       "LawnGreen"           
#> [364] "SlateBlue"            "AliceBlue"            "Magenta"             
#> [367] "Blue"                 "DarkSlateBlue"        "DarkSalmon"          
#> [370] "Navy"                 "DarkSeaGreen"         "Cornsilk"            
#> [373] "Salmon"               "Magenta"              "Khaki"               
#> [376] "MistyRose"            "LavenderBlush"        "GoldenRod"           
#> [379] "Peru"                 "Gray"                 "Gold"                
#> [382] "Tan"                  "HotPink"              "MediumBlue"          
#> [385] "Orchid"               "Cyan"                 "DarkOliveGreen"      
#> [388] "DarkOrchid"           "DodgerBlue"           "Orange"              
#> [391] "Lime"                 "Silver"               "DarkSalmon"          
#> [394] "LightCoral"           "MediumVioletRed"      "SlateBlue"           
#> [397] "Turquoise"            "LightSeaGreen"        "Chartreuse"          
#> [400] "PaleGoldenRod"        "Thistle"              "Chocolate"           
#> [403] "PaleGoldenRod"        "LightPink"            "White"               
#> [406] "FireBrick"            "CadetBlue"            "PaleVioletRed"       
#> [409] "DarkMagenta"          "FireBrick"            "DeepPink"            
#> [412] "MediumBlue"           "SlateBlue"            "Wheat"               
#> [415] "ForestGreen"          "Wheat"                "MediumVioletRed"     
#> [418] "Cyan"                 "Fuchsia"              "Peru"                
#> [421] "DarkOrchid"           "Chocolate"            "Sienna"              
#> [424] "OrangeRed"            "PaleTurquoise"        "Moccasin"            
#> [427] "SpringGreen"          "LightYellow"          "Magenta"             
#> [430] "LimeGreen"            "LightCoral"           "LavenderBlush"       
#> [433] "LightBlue"            "Lime"                 "DeepSkyBlue"         
#> [436] "Coral"                "PaleTurquoise"        "Black"               
#> [439] "Turquoise"            "DarkOliveGreen"       "PowderBlue"          
#> [442] "Indigo"               "Purple"               "MediumPurple"        
#> [445] "PaleVioletRed"        "LightYellow"          "SaddleBrown"         
#> [448] "LightCyan"            "LightGray"            "DimGray"             
#> [451] "LightCyan"            "PaleVioletRed"        "MediumSlateBlue"     
#> [454] "Orange"               "DarkSeaGreen"         "PaleVioletRed"       
#> [457] "LimeGreen"            "Khaki"                "LightSeaGreen"       
#> [460] "LightCyan"            "GhostWhite"           "Coral"               
#> [463] "Pink"                 "Salmon"               "Tan"                 
#> [466] "MistyRose"            "OldLace"              "MediumBlue"          
#> [469] "DarkCyan"             "Fuchsia"              "Cornsilk"            
#> [472] "ForestGreen"          "HoneyDew"             "Pink"                
#> [475] "DeepPink"             "DarkSlateBlue"        "SaddleBrown"         
#> [478] "Tomato"               "FloralWhite"          "RosyBrown"           
#> [481] "DarkSlateGray"        "AliceBlue"            "Red"                 
#> [484] "MintCream"            "Aqua"                 "Salmon"              
#> [487] "AntiqueWhite"         "DarkSalmon"           "IndianRed"           
#> [490] "RoyalBlue"            "White"                "Lavender"            
#> [493] "LimeGreen"            "ForestGreen"          "Cyan"                
#> [496] "DarkSlateBlue"        "Aquamarine"           "Aquamarine"          
#> [499] "Brown"                "DarkTurquoise"       

ch_safe_color_name()

#> [1] "white"
ch_safe_color_name(10)

#>  [1] "olive"   "green"   "blue"    "fuchsia" "navy"    "silver"  "fuchsia"
#>  [8] "black"   "maroon"  "teal"   

ch_hex_color()

#> [1] "#868F6A"
ch_hex_color(10)

#>  [1] "#719794" "#A53F75" "#775E0C" "#34A704" "#74AEDB" "#5EE7BB" "#52A987"
#>  [8] "#B6F669" "#E2E384" "#90F370"
ch_hex_color(1000)

#>    [1] "#160D62" "#896DF0" "#7B174D" "#C9E7D0" "#4CA9F0" "#FA8473" "#C95202"
#>    [8] "#11A3E1" "#E327D4" "#732469" "#43E350" "#1DEA0D" "#B5090E" "#8F7AAE"
#>   [15] "#FDDBC6" "#CCDE89" "#FA8CF2" "#459073" "#2C0396" "#654CDA" "#FE1AD9"
#>   [22] "#C2E852" "#4DF855" "#AB2FB4" "#DE66E2" "#963548" "#CF9098" "#ABFEE2"
#>   [29] "#DFCF89" "#785E37" "#3C3847" "#6ED7B6" "#A4664B" "#4E912F" "#9B80BA"
#>   [36] "#14244F" "#98A966" "#AB52C4" "#EFB6F2" "#ED2555" "#78C549" "#B8FADE"
#>   [43] "#70D155" "#50EA0A" "#2DC64D" "#800BB5" "#D695EF" "#C85E89" "#36D00D"
#>   [50] "#24F52F" "#298021" "#111428" "#5EF82A" "#BF7855" "#6E2BB9" "#527876"
#>   [57] "#B15132" "#857E11" "#C5E5A3" "#9B3143" "#E1027E" "#E9562F" "#B96340"
#>   [64] "#2E16AE" "#441CC8" "#217878" "#DA2E25" "#B77DBB" "#B3940B" "#B750C9"
#>   [71] "#D9E614" "#D5629B" "#DFC9D6" "#D9BBF0" "#A1D863" "#ED9F10" "#D7C50C"
#>   [78] "#354EB1" "#8D87FC" "#801692" "#D5A618" "#20B25F" "#7B559E" "#868076"
#>   [85] "#CDBB81" "#1E05BD" "#32F663" "#D5A380" "#EA4CB3" "#3267CB" "#2AE8F2"
#>   [92] "#FD4028" "#3DB4E6" "#8E0DA1" "#1604D4" "#DE5275" "#852F92" "#BE1A32"
#>   [99] "#C4D1F6" "#7A83E4" "#1328BE" "#4957B7" "#C281DD" "#423158" "#0BAA8C"
#>  [106] "#71DDA4" "#EDD9C3" "#C9281D" "#D7E8DA" "#D7D5B5" "#0A2FF2" "#A47F62"
#>  [113] "#DE0669" "#7BC10F" "#C7CF09" "#CAB03E" "#F7249B" "#1CF212" "#976933"
#>  [120] "#E4B4E9" "#DD78BC" "#2C545D" "#38211F" "#19BD89" "#D04668" "#B2E694"
#>  [127] "#290511" "#326580" "#1AE7AA" "#7B52AB" "#A69FBC" "#B0796D" "#544A4C"
#>  [134] "#E525CD" "#E0BB70" "#F4F5B5" "#EABAB7" "#8AD0D4" "#4E34FF" "#6D474F"
#>  [141] "#1F3EF0" "#BC1AC5" "#E17A8D" "#C957B8" "#47DED9" "#2CC712" "#354CBE"
#>  [148] "#3199CC" "#187C3A" "#A9F9A7" "#F3CB04" "#9479C5" "#0B1C9A" "#C09F37"
#>  [155] "#10876B" "#FB7EBE" "#917264" "#EF6DBE" "#AD61A0" "#D6995A" "#FFD9C4"
#>  [162] "#9A370B" "#5377D2" "#0471C8" "#4B6513" "#A9A1BA" "#D10CB0" "#DE8901"
#>  [169] "#44BE09" "#A4C9B1" "#66DB10" "#1C86B7" "#003C77" "#13C12A" "#FB4BB9"
#>  [176] "#C69B1D" "#20BFC7" "#3BE176" "#EF66B2" "#4CBBCB" "#A3DD7D" "#1DFEDE"
#>  [183] "#6904AA" "#D7B108" "#1E3446" "#74041F" "#85C878" "#D8ECD6" "#E92D27"
#>  [190] "#4D403E" "#E12389" "#1D61EF" "#32E7C3" "#0BDDD8" "#25A166" "#BB481F"
#>  [197] "#854B58" "#4C163D" "#6FE3EE" "#EBA96C" "#27C911" "#0695DC" "#D5DC54"
#>  [204] "#9EB8C6" "#4AB6CA" "#C098B5" "#382937" "#BCC44B" "#A244C6" "#247ECB"
#>  [211] "#D597C7" "#AAD622" "#20A6C8" "#1BBFEC" "#4BD855" "#8E3D7B" "#B4C630"
#>  [218] "#A1CDCE" "#B67200" "#20B98A" "#3516C4" "#C9282C" "#321491" "#CA0CB8"
#>  [225] "#1E331F" "#DD3276" "#BD0069" "#5705D9" "#308238" "#F13F9C" "#CBB73A"
#>  [232] "#7774E9" "#A8B09F" "#07D90E" "#C0F13C" "#0C4CED" "#860EBF" "#97CD1F"
#>  [239] "#9BC850" "#B37E2E" "#CE82C6" "#BF601C" "#FFA364" "#8B48BE" "#EB529D"
#>  [246] "#D9AECA" "#AFB31B" "#BFE797" "#F90827" "#0B06CD" "#7B714A" "#A615D8"
#>  [253] "#CF18B0" "#6FFA2A" "#0BB097" "#A2B500" "#14A060" "#281389" "#67D763"
#>  [260] "#85A48D" "#D7FAD1" "#A33338" "#0A914E" "#5A1555" "#163073" "#39D948"
#>  [267] "#422B9F" "#6A4908" "#D6C2B1" "#72AD56" "#F90061" "#FF33F8" "#9D5323"
#>  [274] "#6A81F1" "#003A0F" "#76C0BF" "#993AD5" "#6F7783" "#372C69" "#EC00BA"
#>  [281] "#C28BD1" "#0A7E0C" "#0AB607" "#EC2512" "#12BCD3" "#9C912A" "#6C8D31"
#>  [288] "#70CF4E" "#894C3B" "#DC3C03" "#337653" "#2A1E1F" "#E3D23F" "#E74470"
#>  [295] "#156D3A" "#C055B1" "#8B96C7" "#CB0E5E" "#E4F491" "#3C2E03" "#7F0FB4"
#>  [302] "#71D03F" "#91ADBD" "#9B4667" "#F9B82B" "#57364B" "#8EA398" "#B163D9"
#>  [309] "#6D16D7" "#6B5478" "#439D1D" "#D68668" "#3D74F1" "#1F1A70" "#8D2A1C"
#>  [316] "#13EF52" "#89C4A9" "#AF4D64" "#76381F" "#D47410" "#FD84F6" "#78ADE3"
#>  [323] "#345781" "#8D2F95" "#02CF94" "#ECED43" "#6C9C81" "#CA9B01" "#38B7A5"
#>  [330] "#5D46F9" "#1D2751" "#FA865C" "#6DB9FB" "#6D2F8E" "#0E4255" "#5DDACF"
#>  [337] "#805909" "#C13C0E" "#8EED76" "#FAB597" "#84540A" "#1547AC" "#8D2CAF"
#>  [344] "#674713" "#78E404" "#EA9322" "#F05FBE" "#AC3FE1" "#FFEF90" "#C1D754"
#>  [351] "#901B19" "#760A5C" "#A02F0A" "#9B696A" "#8DBA09" "#BE852B" "#820C8D"
#>  [358] "#9B30A0" "#DB8BEE" "#8F78AA" "#F0A8AD" "#8481E6" "#B14D48" "#32DA41"
#>  [365] "#345D60" "#A1EF77" "#3346B7" "#BB3981" "#4638DE" "#62A581" "#F04389"
#>  [372] "#E61ED5" "#5BABD1" "#EB8E7E" "#40130E" "#D7321F" "#EF6194" "#74F211"
#>  [379] "#BA78ED" "#DD057E" "#2C0939" "#2A485E" "#5ED6F7" "#42C69A" "#FA3A97"
#>  [386] "#569565" "#9ACC36" "#B05A0C" "#9ACC6D" "#5FDEF4" "#701426" "#9C7A6B"
#>  [393] "#F616C9" "#B3C964" "#714995" "#C8C4DC" "#4F856D" "#290D6C" "#17A494"
#>  [400] "#68BFFF" "#6AF5BB" "#060866" "#551A6C" "#BA6EB3" "#63287F" "#ED294A"
#>  [407] "#B7953E" "#20FE2F" "#C2A57E" "#A3A2E0" "#725D98" "#C9D616" "#EDD28F"
#>  [414] "#C5841B" "#D7BD73" "#090986" "#F2C221" "#129065" "#1DC86B" "#DDB77C"
#>  [421] "#27228E" "#0A7448" "#3F603C" "#BE1CB3" "#1DC54C" "#328854" "#C2480B"
#>  [428] "#E0E332" "#800FF4" "#C0AA52" "#BB26D5" "#243725" "#8A83E6" "#51D11F"
#>  [435] "#9A5800" "#B48A4C" "#718C2C" "#584BCA" "#FA9901" "#9B4902" "#3DAFE4"
#>  [442] "#0A48A5" "#5B1F86" "#ED508B" "#E13C37" "#D0C9F9" "#C28C92" "#600875"
#>  [449] "#E20780" "#A4E82C" "#218AD8" "#CFC5CA" "#59A458" "#F37C88" "#2BBB76"
#>  [456] "#189892" "#7C8B01" "#1A95D1" "#946A0C" "#23648E" "#D85A66" "#84C5D1"
#>  [463] "#72E116" "#DAF1C7" "#445370" "#8885E6" "#5282A5" "#F2731C" "#4D8B1B"
#>  [470] "#A98660" "#3AA4C0" "#932F07" "#64EE91" "#654766" "#771197" "#2A9B7C"
#>  [477] "#CDB888" "#1C58D9" "#14D46F" "#6AF8A6" "#3F8B5A" "#40325B" "#AD22E3"
#>  [484] "#0A5BF9" "#E56207" "#31296C" "#78FF12" "#3CAC1D" "#8504B1" "#8363F2"

#>  [806] "#6CA91C" "#C7B3C4" "#22B9BB" "#0BFAF8" "#87423C" "#ADC4D3" "#43625A"
#>  [813] "#21F84E" "#1C8748" "#DCF929" "#8EE2F0" "#B8D672" "#3A48FC" "#BD9CAF"
#>  [820] "#954821" "#917142" "#46D16B" "#2628E6" "#12EEEC" "#C01BE1" "#DFB415"

#>  [869] "#57AAAE" "#5CA63D" "#6DE2F7" "#93C7B3" "#73CF70" "#BB8889" "#2FAA22"
#>  [876] "#63E919" "#68895B" "#8B443E" "#41A53F" "#8F5ABC" "#550634" "#9C1571"
#>  [883] "#54C012" "#111B4D" "#46D0E4" "#B4941E" "#1B7D5B" "#D15C04" "#957EBC"
#>  [890] "#8D5C4D" "#A25791" "#EE8D85" "#02DC87" "#6B6EE9" "#664542" "#5BB5A7"
#>  [897] "#72A373" "#AFA6D8" "#CFC298" "#F4CB8D" "#B696E5" "#DE2772" "#657BCA"
#>  [904] "#32A0B2" "#B1AF9F" "#4814EA" "#935944" "#EC1AC8" "#4A9E12" "#CEA9FF"
#>  [911] "#5EB90E" "#87E29A" "#4C1380" "#E52594" "#7678B8" "#97B5E9" "#A8A923"
#>  [918] "#949617" "#EF92BB" "#492939" "#EB1A0D" "#3A31DA" "#E1A50D" "#B9D71B"
#>  [925] "#CCADFC" "#7D7DE6" "#364FCD" "#E774BF" "#77F48D" "#71685E" "#336D23"
#>  [932] "#3436CF" "#8A27F8" "#3FACC1" "#500E10" "#A2C03F" "#47998F" "#8A1694"
#>  [939] "#814929" "#38999E" "#655D25" "#85A427" "#227EA2" "#15A589" "#E92652"
#>  [946] "#6321F2" "#904163" "#4B5B2D" "#316C10" "#BD7750" "#C64CA6" "#02E9F4"
#>  [953] "#0AC73F" "#C13D06" "#A7D58E" "#DFFC4F" "#CD9D2C" "#C97339" "#C3C0CC"
#>  [960] "#14A615" "#7E3652" "#33DBD1" "#4581FD" "#21941B" "#AF764D" "#2CF0D6"
#>  [967] "#119BC6" "#6056D6" "#F3920C" "#B0CB40" "#03021B" "#E4A65C" "#B51D9D"
#>  [974] "#1EE336" "#5495A8" "#C95B68" "#E1638F" "#A9B8B6" "#CA5B22" "#62C511"
#>  [981] "#D7C59E" "#C5BD99" "#D4E001" "#2503D6" "#78CE23" "#9145F5" "#A7FAB2"
#>  [988] "#BD5627" "#4E43C9" "#77D0E2" "#D69AEC" "#8E65D7" "#00255A" "#62629C"
#>  [995] "#B77A7F" "#E29877" "#B1358A" "#374F32" "#C0A276" "#B5EA78"

ch_safe_hex_color()

#> [1] "#ff00ff"
ch_safe_hex_color(10)

#>  [1] "#ccffff" "#ccffcc" "#660066" "#99cc33" "#cc9900" "#666633" "#333366"
#>  [8] "#006600" "#9900cc" "#99ccff"

ch_rgb_color()

#> [[1]]
#> [1] 101 248 230
#> 
ch_rgb_color(10)

#> [[1]]
#> [1] 121  56 236
#> 
#> [[2]]
#> [1] 212 196 218
#> 
#> [[3]]
#> [1] 121 193 151
#> 
#> [[4]]
#> [1]  46 207 181
#> 
#> [[5]]
#> [1] 227 158 231
#> 
#> [[6]]
#> [1] 145  55  82
#> 
#> [[7]]
#> [1] 132 252   8
#> 
#> [[8]]
#> [1] 231  36 251
#> 
#> [[9]]
#> [1] 156 217 107
#> 
#> [[10]]
#> [1] 133 176  56
#> 

ch_rgb_css_color()

#> [1] "rgb(5, 223, 3)"
ch_rgb_css_color(10)

#>  [1] "rgb(117, 127, 40)"  "rgb(24, 145, 87)"   "rgb(188, 37, 248)" 
#>  [4] "rgb(111, 157, 212)" "rgb(69, 251, 16)"   "rgb(85, 255, 117)" 
#>  [7] "rgb(60, 44, 151)"   "rgb(242, 101, 138)" "rgb(32, 96, 92)"   
#> [10] "rgb(253, 142, 64)" 

ch_color_name(locale = "uk_UA")

#> [1] "Дерева"
ch_color_name(n = 10, locale = "uk_UA")

#>  [1] "Берлінська лазур"      "Колір морської піни"   "Кораловий"            
#>  [4] "Чорний"                "Темно-оливковий"       "Блакитно-зелений"     
#>  [7] "Червоновато-брунатний" "Сірий"                 "Зелена сосна"         
#> [10] "Яскраво-рожевий"      

ch_safe_color_name(locale = "uk_UA")

#> [1] "Червоний"
ch_safe_color_name(n = 10, locale = "uk_UA")

#>  [1] "Пурпурний"    "Червоний"     "Помаранчевий" "Сірий"        "Пурпурний"   
#>  [6] "Темно-синій"  "Синій"        "Білий"        "Сірий"        "Срібний"
